title: Chronological Summarization of Historical Events
scenario: Develop a prompt that will generate a chronological summary of historical events, including key dates, events, and figures. The LLM output should be a text summary, 250-300 words in length, that clearly organizes the events in chronological order and provides context and explanations for the significant events.
constraints: Must include a clear description of the historical events and the desired chronological summary
Must use a logical order and organization of the events

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the prompt correctly organizes the historical events in chronological order
Assesses the quality and informativeness of the summary, including the accuracy of the presented information
Evaluates the effectiveness of the summary in providing context and explanations for the historical events
Ensures the summary adheres to the target length and is not excessively long or short
